---
title: "Hook goes here. Then the finding in plain words"
subtitle: "One literal line that hands a skimmer the result"
author: "Mislav Sagovac"
date: "YYYY.MM.DD"
categories: [gfi, sektori, zaposlenost]
draft: true
---

<!-- House style. Punchy and present tense. Periods over colons, arrows over long dashes, italics over quote marks. Numbers lead. Full guide in _workflow/house-style-guide.md. -->

[Opening punch. One or two numbers that frame the whole post.]

## First finding stated as a claim

[Chart caption in one literal line.]

[Two or three tight sentences. The number leads. Change shown with an arrow, like 65.000 → 162.000. Magnitude in parentheses, plus or minus spelled out.]

[KUT] [Where the author reads meaning into the pattern.]

## Second finding stated as a claim

[Chart caption.]

[Prose.]

## Tko je dobio, a tko izgubio

[Chart caption.]

Dobitnici. [...]
Gubitnici. [...]

[KUT — glavna interpretacija] [The central angle of the post.]

## Napomene

Izvor. [source]
Tablica. `db_afs`
Stupci. `employeecounteop`, `nacerev21`
Skripte. `R/<build>.R`, `R/<charts>.R`
Oprez. [what is not trusted yet]
